name: Puff Pastry Patty Shells
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Basic puff pastry; see recipe for details
recipeInstructions:
1. Roll out the basic puff pastry on a lightly floured surface to a thickness of 3/8 inch (approximately).
2. Cut rounds as close together as possible using a 3-inch cutter.
3. Place the round pastry pieces on an ungreased baking sheet.
4. Make an indentation about 1/4 inch deep at the center of each pastry round using a 2-inch cutter.
5. Lightly brush the tops of the pastry rounds with beaten egg.
6. Freeze for 10 minutes to set the egg wash.
7. Preheat your oven to 450 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Place the baking sheet in the oven and reduce the temperature to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes, or until the pastries are puffed and golden brown.
10. Remove from the wire rack to cool.
11. Carefully remove the centers of each patty shell.
